com.societegenerale.failover.observable.micrometer.FailoverMeterBinder

Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.

  • Uses of FailoverMeterBinder in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return FailoverMeterBinder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverMeterBinder
    FailoverMicrometerAutoConfiguration.failoverMeterBinder(FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverExpiryExtractor expiryExtractor, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<FailoverStore<Object>> failoverStore)
    Binds failover.registered.total and per-failover failover.config.expiry.seconds gauges to the registry.
